```{.r .cell-code}
condo_resale = read_csv("data/aspatial/Condo_resale_2015.csv")
```

```{.r .cell-code}
condo_resale.sf <- st_as_sf(condo_resale,
                            coords = c("LONGITUDE", "LATITUDE"),
                            crs=4326) %>%
  st_transform(crs=3414)
```

```{.r .cell-code}
condo.mlr <- lm(formula = SELLING_PRICE ~ AREA_SQM + AGE    + 
                  PROX_CBD + PROX_CHILDCARE + PROX_ELDERLYCARE +
                  PROX_URA_GROWTH_AREA + PROX_HAWKER_MARKET + PROX_KINDERGARTEN + 
                  PROX_MRT  + PROX_PARK + PROX_PRIMARY_SCH + 
                  PROX_TOP_PRIMARY_SCH + PROX_SHOPPING_MALL + PROX_SUPERMARKET + 
                  PROX_BUS_STOP + NO_Of_UNITS + FAMILY_FRIENDLY + FREEHOLD, 
                data=condo_resale.sf)  #using the sf version
summary(condo.mlr)
```

```{.r .cell-code}
condo.mlr1 <- lm(formula = SELLING_PRICE ~ AREA_SQM + AGE + 
                   PROX_CBD + PROX_CHILDCARE + PROX_ELDERLYCARE +
                   PROX_URA_GROWTH_AREA + PROX_MRT  + PROX_PARK + 
                   PROX_PRIMARY_SCH + PROX_SHOPPING_MALL    + PROX_BUS_STOP + 
                   NO_Of_UNITS + FAMILY_FRIENDLY + FREEHOLD,
                 data=condo_resale.sf)
ols_regress(condo.mlr1)
```

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ols_vif_tol(condo_mlr)
```
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
condo_fw_mlr <- ols_step_forward_p(
  condo_mlr,
  p_val = 0.05,
  details = FALSE
)
```
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Export the residuals of the multivariate linear regression model and save them as a data frame
mlr_output <- as.data.frame(condo_fw_mlr$model$residuals) %>%
  rename("FW_MLR_RES" = 'condo_fw_mlr$model$residuals')

# Join the newly created data frame with the condo_resale_sf object
condo_resale_sf <- cbind(condo_resale_sf,
                         mlr_output$FW_MLR_RES) %>%
  rename("MLR_RES" = mlr_output$FW_MLR_RES)
```
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
tmap_mode("view")
tmap_options(check.and.fix = TRUE)
tm_shape(mpsz)+
  tmap_options(check.and.fix = TRUE)+
  tm_polygons(alpha = 0.4) +
tm_shape(condo_resale_sf)+
  tm_dots(col = "MLR_RES",
          alpha=0.6,
          style="quantile")
tmap_mode("plot")
```
:::


estimate value

sfdep


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Calculate the distance-based weight matrix using the dnearneigh function from the spdep package
condo_resale_sf <- condo_resale_sf %>%
  mutate(nb = st_knn(geometry, k=6, 
                     longlat = FALSE),
         wt = st_weights(nb, 
                         style = "W"),
         .before = 1)

# Perform a Monte-Carlo simulation test of the global Moran's I
global_moran_perm(condo_resale_sf$MLR_RES,
                  condo_resale_sf$nb,
                  condo_resale_sf$wt,
                  alternative = "two.sided",
                  nsim = 99)
```
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
bw_fixed <- bw.gwr(formula = SELLING_PRICE ~ AREA_SQM + AGE +
                     PROX_CBD + PROX_CHILDCARE +
                     PROX_ELDERLYCARE + PROX_URA_GROWTH_AREA +
                     PROX_MRT + PROX_PARK + PROX_PRIMARY_SCH +
                     PROX_SHOPPING_MALL + PROX_BUS_STOP +
                     NO_OF_UNITS + FAMILY_FRIENDLY + FREEHOLD,
                   data = condo_resale_sf,
                   approach = "CV", # Use cross validation (CV) to choose the bandwidth
                   kernel = "gaussian", 
                   adaptive = FALSE, 
                   longlat = FALSE) # Using plane coordinates
```
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
tmap_mode("view")
tm_shape(mpsz_svy21)+
  tm_polygons(alpha = 0.1) +
tm_shape(condo_resale.sf.adaptive) +  
  tm_dots(col = "Local_R2",
          border.col = "gray60",
          border.lwd = 1) +
  tm_view(set.zoom.limits = c(11,14))
```
:::
